description.value:
Beginning at 3rd level, you have gained the ability to focus your eyes into slits allowing you to see things with finer detail, and even see past what a creature looks like on the surface.

Twice per rest or by spending a chakra die you may activate your Silver Eyes for 1 hour out of combat and 1 minute in combat. You may activate your Silver Eyes at any time with no action economy cost.

For the duration, you gain the following benefits:

  • You gain 60 feet of chakra sight and this range is doubled for the purposes of identifying and searching for Aberrations, Demons, Monstrosities, Mutants, and Undead which will now be referred to as Unnatural Beings. Additionally, you gain an additional free action to take the Search Skill Action to find Unnatural Beings and all checks made to find or identify them are made at advantage.

  • You gain a +1 critical threat range against Unnatural Beings and you ignore half of all of their DR. Additionally, if you would impose a Saving Throw against an Unnatural Beings they receive a -2 penalty to their saving throw.

  • While fighting Unnatural Beings you gain an additional reaction once per round, for the purposes of making attacks of opportunity against them. This attack cannot be made with any penalties imposed by hostile creatures.
